page: Microsoft Azure D4ns_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dnv6 server family. Powered by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical Intel Xeon 8573C cores with hyper-threading enabled. The processor operates at a base clock speed of 4.2 GHz and includes a 260 MB L3 cache. The system is provisioned with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This server does not include local storage, though it is premium storage capable for external disk attachments. It does not bundle any complimentary public IPv4 addresses or GPUs. The underlying Intel Xeon architecture supports advanced instruction sets, including Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512) and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for tile and integer operations, alongside hardware-accelerated cryptography via AES and SHA extensions.

Benchmark evaluations indicate average single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core CPU metrics and single-threaded gzip compression rates positioning the server in the middle 50% tier. However, multi-core scaling is relatively weak, falling into the bottom 25% tier for both multi-core stress-ng and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Given the 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated compute allocation, this instance is suited for general-purpose workloads, network-optimized tasks, and lightweight web serving that do not require dense multi-threaded execution or local storage.
description: The Microsoft Azure D4ns_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dnv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs derived from 2 physical Intel Xeon 8573C cores operating at 4.2 GHz, paired with 16.0 GB of RAM. The architecture includes a 260 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and Intel AMX. This server does not bundle local storage or GPUs, relying instead on external premium storage capabilities. Performance benchmarks show average single-core execution, such as single-threaded gzip compression, but multi-core scaling remains in the lower 25% tier. This resource profile is suited for general-purpose applications, network-oriented services, and workloads requiring dedicated CPU allocation without heavy multi-threaded demands.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D4ns_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs from an Intel Xeon 8573C processor, 16.0 GB of RAM, and premium storage capabilities without bundled local disks.

tagline: A dedicated four-vCPU virtual machine featuring high-frequency Intel Xeon processing and balanced memory allocation for general-purpose workloads.

Intel Xeon 8573C processor operating at 4.2 GHz
Supports AVX-512 and Intel AMX instruction sets
